gazette: 25 Şubat 2023 Tarihli ve 32115 Sayılı Resmî Gazete
title: Surveillance licensing requirement introduced on the import of certain unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) used in plant protection
bodyHtml:
The Communiqué (2023/3) introducing import licensing requirements on certain unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) used in plant protection has been published in the Official Gazette.

The Communique applies only to the UAVs registered according to the Directive on Plant Protection Equipment and classified under the tariff headings;

-8806.23.00.00.00 With maximum take-off weight more than 7 kg but not more than 25 kg

-8806.24.00.00.00 With maximum take-off weight more than 25 kg but not more than150 kg 

According to the Communique, importation can only be done with a surveillance certificate issued by the Ministry of Trade when the customs value is below the price threshold. In other words, if the value of imports is above the said threshold, a surveillance certificate is not required. On the imports of subject products, the price threshold is USD 30.000 per unit.

Importers may declare a higher customs value than the actual transaction value in order to complete the import operations to avoid licensing procedures.

The Communiqué enters into force on the 30th day following its publication, that is 27 March 2023.

Please click to view the Communique.
